titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Dorothy Simmons collection of Laura (Riding) Jackson letters, 1937-1968.
Dorothy Simmons collection of Laura (Riding) Jackson letters, 1937-1968.

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

profiledesc.creation: Finding aid encoded by Martin Heggestad May 2003

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Dorothy Simmons Collection of Laura (Riding) Jackson Letters,1937-1968
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2002 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: Dorothy Simmons collection of Laura (Riding) Jackson letters,
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Consists of correspondence collected by Dorothy Simmons, and includes letters sent to her by various friends, letters written by Laura (Riding) Jackson to Dorothy Simmons and her husband Montague Simmons, letters sent to Schuyler B. Jackson, and letters sent to Laura (Riding) Jackson by the Simmons. Included are a few manuscripts by Laura (Riding) Jackson.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Dorothy Simmons was a sculptress and author, and member of a literary circle that included American poet and critic Laura (Riding) Jackson.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Consists of correspondence collected by Dorothy Simmons, and includes letters sent to her by various friends, letters written by Laura (Riding) Jackson to Dorothy Simmons and her husband Montague Simmons, letters sent to Schuyler B. Jackson, and letters sent to Laura (Riding) Jackson by the Simmons. Included are a few manuscripts by Laura (Riding) Jackson.

did.unittitle: L(R)J to the Simmons (postcards and telegrams)
Dorothy and Montague Simmons to L(R)J
The Covenant of Literal Morality: Protocol I (Seizin Press, 1938), pp. 1-16
"When the Skies Part," t.s., carbon, 2 pp.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Dorothy Simmons collection of Laura (Riding) Jackson letters, #6305. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
